reviews.school_name: The Future Kids School - Financial District
reviews.author: Sanchit Mittal
reviews.review_body:
I am genuinely delighted with my decision to choose The FKS. Reasons
1. Thoughtful Approach - which FKS leadership and all the teachers carries there - focus on child overall development and beyond academics
2. Teachers dedication - The dedication of FKS teachers is unparalleled. Their efforts go beyond the classroom—like sunrays reaching every corner of a garden. Have you ever witnessed any event or an annual function spanning four days, meticulously organized to ensure every child’s participation? FKS achieves precisely that.
3. Practical learning - Personally, I’ve observed FKS encouraging students to observe, think critically, and learn actively. Very nice.
4. Above all - lot of learnings for parents, Accept it ;)

reviews.school_name: The Future Kids School - Financial District
reviews.author: Jwala
reviews.review_body: Pls save ur child the mental trauma and stay away from this school, they have abusive teachers who do not understand the kids, who schold the kids for no reason, do not finish the syllabus, half the grade fails after ever semester, the school is good at sports but doesn’t even have proper courts to host tournaments, the main issue is really the teachers who are abusive

reviews.author: Naina Shetty
reviews.review_body: I wish my daughter continued to study here, we had to relocate from Hyderabad, so with heavy heart we had to move my daughter from FKS..The teachers here are amazing! Shailaja ma'am is a rockstar who manages school with the great passion, her dedication towards students is so encouraging for both kids and parents😊 Miss this school 😔
